'''zazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:runically|runically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:runically|runically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zazate|zazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zazatesher|zazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazatesherĂ«m|zazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zazatero|zazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zazateshĂ«|zazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazateshĂ«m|zazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizazatero|gokizazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizazateshĂ«|gokizazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizazateshĂ«m|gokizazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozazankerom|gozazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozazankeshĂ«|gozazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozazankeshĂ«m|gozazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozazankeya|gozazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zazaterom|zazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazatemu|zazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zazateya|zazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizazaterom|gokizazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizazatemu|gokizazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizazateya|gokizazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zazazate|zazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zazazatesher|zazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazazatesherĂ«m|zazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zazazatero|zazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zazazateshĂ«|zazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazazateshĂ«m|zazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizazazatero|gokizazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizazazateshĂ«|gokizazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizazazateshĂ«m|gokizazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozazazankerom|gozazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozazazankeshĂ«|gozazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozazazankeshĂ«m|gozazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozazazankeya|gozazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zazazaterom|zazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zazazatemu|zazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zazazateya|zazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizazazaterom|gokizazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizazazatemu|gokizazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizazazateya|gokizazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠte|zĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠtesher|zĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠtero|zĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠtero|gokizĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠterom|zĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠtemu|zĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠzĂŠteya|zĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠterom|gokizĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠzĂŠteya|gokizĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafzafte|zafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafzaftesher|zafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafzaftesherĂ«m|zafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafzaftero|zafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafzafteshĂ«|zafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafzafteshĂ«m|zafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafzaftero|gokizafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafzafteshĂ«|gokizafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafzafteshĂ«m|gokizafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafzafnkerom|gozafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafzafnkeshĂ«|gozafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafzafnkeshĂ«m|gozafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafzafnkeya|gozafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafzafterom|zafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafzaftemu|zafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafzafteya|zafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafzafterom|gokizafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafzaftemu|gokizafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafzafteya|gokizafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
